goal: Build a fully working Discord bot using discord.js v14. The bot should have slash commands registered on startup using REST API. Commands: /ping (shows bot latency and API latency), /help (shows all available commands with descriptions), /roll [sides] (rolls a dice with 1-100 sides, default 6), /avatar [user] (shows a user's avatar as an embed). Load the bot token and client ID from a .env file using dotenv. Use GatewayIntentBits.Guilds. Handle the interactionCreate event to dispatch commands. Handle the ready event to log bot startup. Include a commands collection (Map or Collection from discord.js). Each command is its own file in src/commands/. Export a data (SlashCommandBuilder) and execute (interaction) function from each command file. Main entry point loads all command files, registers them via REST, then starts the bot. Include error handling for unknown commands and command execution errors. Write a complete README with setup instructions including how to get a bot token, set BOT_TOKEN and CLIENT_ID in .env, invite the bot, and run it with bun src/index.ts

files.purpose: Main Discord bot entry point with client initialization and event setup
Command collection and registration system using Map/Collection
Slash command interaction handler for interactionCreate event
REST API command registrar for slash commands
Dotenv configuration loader for environment variables
Error handling middleware for command execution
Unit tests for bot initialization and event handling
Project configuration with dependencies and scripts
